name: Dromeas SA
summary: Dromeas SA produces and sells office furniture, partition walls, filing systems, and custom-made furniture solutions. It offers office chairs and desk seating products, including executive, working, visitor, and conference chairs; public and auditorium seating products; stools; and office lounge chairs and sofas. The company also provides desk and workstations, such as executive and work desks, conference and meeting tables, sit/stand desks, auxiliary desks, and folding tables; pedestals, including executive, melamine, and metallic pedestals products; melamine, veneer, and metallic bookcases; and sliding tracked storage systems. In addition, it offers furniture for education and reception, as well as space division accessories; and sound absorbing partitions. Further, the company provides die-casted aluminum equipment for the automotive industry. It offers its products through 32 branded stores in Greece and the Balkans; and exports its products to the United Kingdom, Germany, Belgium, Switzerland, Australia, Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates, Qatar, Egypt, Cyprus, Russia, Bulgaria, and Albania. Dromeas SA was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Serres, Greece.
